feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 104,174Chapters: 68/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.summary:
Author: My_Sweet_Prince

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,084Chapters: 9/15Kudos: 38

entry.title: Senior Assassin
entry.summary:
Author: irish_fish

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,770Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: “Arthur!” Merlin turned to him with a sunshine-y grin that dimpled his cheeks, “can I help you with something?” Arthur realized he should speak now. “Oh, um, yes. I’m supposed to give you my buy in money and then you’ll give it to your uncle, right?” “You convinced your father, then?” Merlin asked, his smile returning. Arthur chuckled and scratched the back of his now slightly warm neck, “Uh, no actually. He doesn’t know I’m doing this.” Merlin’s eyes flickered down for a second then met his again, “Well, I think that’s great! Um, I’m glad you’re joining us.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,419Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 99

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Wait for Me (I'm coming with you)
entry.summary:
Author: Lilbug2422

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,070Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 35

Summary: Merlin sets off to Ealdor using the excuse of visiting her mother, hiding the true reason behind her trip to herself. However when Arthur and the knights tag along (totally because they have business in that area of the kingdom and NOT because they're worried about Merlin traveling by herself) things get complicated. Merlin doesn't wish to tell them about the real reason she's going to Ealdor, shame of falling to societies expectations of her keeping her mouth sealed tightly. However when the truth gets revealed how will Arthur react to potentially losing his Merlin to those very same expectations? Will he break through his own societal pressures to keep her? Or simply watch her go?

entry.title: Cursed Love
entry.summary:
Author: Nukagirl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,991Chapters: 1/8Kudos: 10

Summary: “I am just about to go get your dinner,” Merlin said, not looking up from his current job, “I’m a bit behind as I was helping Gwen earlier.”Arthur didn’t respond but he walked over to Merlin. Merlin looked up as Arthur was upon him, a look of fury in his eyes. It was too late for Merlin to move as Arthur shoved him back. The armour fell to the ground as Merlin stumbled backwards.“Wha-?” Merlin started to ask but was cut off as Arthur slapped him across the face, his eyes red with anger. Merlin backed away, his hand on his burning cheek, confusion and hurt in his eyes.xArthur has been cursed but the only one that realises is Merlin. Now, he just needs to work out how to break it before Arthur kills him

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Just a Little Fun
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,487Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 141

Summary: Merlin arrives in Camelot and meets an arrogant, infuriatingly attractive knight. Who he thinks is just some Noble's son who wants to get dicked down by a peasant. While Merlin is happy to play along - nothing in Camelot is ever what it seems—and his simple fun is about to get so much more complicated.

entry.title: legacy
entry.summary:
Author: haloud

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,219Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Ten years into Arthur's reign, magic is free and Camelot is at peace. However, some lords still remember the days of King Uther and are less than supportive of Arthur's reforms. When Merlin goes missing on a mission as envoy to one such lord, Arthur will stop at nothing to get him back.

entry.title: To Wage Against Time, Heart, and Death
entry.summary:
Author: RedPanda25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 896Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: The narration of Arthur's thoughts while he knows that he is dying in the ending of the series. Merlin is there. Has always been there and it is only now that Arthur is dying that he truly realizes how much Merlin has done. And how much Arthur loves Merlin.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,994Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 203

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

entry.title: I Thought You Were Dead
entry.summary:
Author: alkimi

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,117Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Gwen kissed him when he recovered from the poisoned chalice. Merlin had never truly understood why. When Arthur stirs at the Lake of Avalon after Camlann, he finally fathomed it out. This is a slow burn, character arc story that follows Merlin and Arthur's relationship after Camlann.

entry.title: The Touch Of Love
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,430Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 278

Summary: Merlin's eyes changed when he did magic. He knew that. In the privacy of his own head, Arthur had come to think of that golden gleam as beautiful since he'd discovered the secret of his sorcery. This was different. It crackled like lightning; a storm held in Merlin's gaze. It cast brief light upon his cheekbones, spilling odd shadows across his face. 'What's happening?' 'He is dying,' a woman's voice said, sugar-sweet. 'And he will take you with him, Arthur Pendragon.' --- A routine hunt threatens to become a fatal disaster when Arthur and Merlin are captured and imprisoned in a dungeon used during the Purge. Can they fight their way to freedom, or will Merlin's power be the death of them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Hold You Together (I’ll Hold You Forever)
entry.summary:
Author: Phoenix Reborn (Artemystic)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,208Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Arthur can’t stop staring — at the blood, the heartbeat, the pulse… at the life that slips and sputters and flows through veins, torn skin, trembling fingers… only to land like broken dreams on a floor of red. He did this. Now he must undo it.

entry.title: THE BOND SERIES: TRIALS OF DESTINY SEASON 1 EPISODE 4
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Obsessed with breaking the Link, Merlin puts his sanity on the line. Feeling he has no choice, Arthur invokes the Magic Trials, a test that could cost them both not only their lives, but the Bond itself. Can they find their back to each other before it's too late? Established MERTHUR. MerlimWHUMP! Protective!Caring!Arthur. SLASH. Mostly T, some graphic scenes (slash and torture).

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,469Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear, and others are made which may destroy them both. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?
